title: A useless infinite scroll experiment
full_text:
📱 Switch to mobile — That’s where the void fully takes shape. ⚠️ The score is only recorded on smartphones. (Thumbs are more honest)
 
 ✕
 

FUTILE — A Useless Infinite Scroll Website and Endless Scrolling Experiment

 

 

 

THE USELESS WEBSITE
 

FUTILE
 

WHERE YOU SCROLL ON
 

!?

 

 ×

The Useless Infinite Scroll Website where the void always wins

What is this site for?

Almost nothing.
Except to measure how far you're willing to go.

Here, we don’t count likes — we count the distance traveled into the void.

A useless and minimalist infinite scroll website designed as a critique of endless scrolling.
It transforms the automatic gesture of infinite scroll — like on social media — into an absurd experiment where the void always wins.
In short, it’s an artistic critique of the endless scrolling found on TikTok, Instagram, Facebook and the rest…

 

Is it dangerous?
 

Only for your productivity and the few minutes of your life that you will never get back. Not to mention a possibly thumb tendinitis.

 

Do I win anything if I reach 10 km?
 

Yes: the certainty of having questionable priorities.

 

Did you know?
 

📚 A serious study proves that scrolling here improves your mood but on a level invisible to the human eye.

 🔍 The bottom of the page is officially unreachable.

 🌍 If everyone scrolled here at the same time, Earth would spin 0.00000001% faster.

 

futile.ch — the void always takes a little more space.

 

 ×
 

You suffered enough.
Don’t suffer alone.
 

 

 

 

 

Going up?
This way leads nowhere either.
 

0.00 mm
 

 Distance scrolled and certified
 
 
( Metric system, You’ll survive )
 

 
 

 

 
 

 You scroll...
We measure.

So scroll !
↓
 

🏅 TOP 100 Ranking

 

 ×
 
 

Mobile ranking
⚠️ Recording only available on mobile!

Because on desktop: turbo scroll wheels, magic scripts, gamer mice worth 2000 bucks… and suddenly, 12 km in 3 seconds.

On mobile, only bionic fingers can win.

It’s the only way to keep a mostly honest ranking in this great championship of nothingness.

 
 🏆 Top 100 🏆

Podium 
 

 Every month, a new podium
